seo.title: Storyboard Generation – AI Video Storyboard Creator | OpenCreator
seo.description: Transform scripts and text into professional video storyboards with AI. Generate cinematic shot sequences with varied camera angles and compositions.

hero.title: Storyboard Generation
hero.description: Transform any script or text into professional video storyboards. AI analyzes your content, identifies key visual moments, and generates cinematic shot sequences with varied camera angles—from establishing shots to close-ups. Perfect for filmmakers, video producers, and content creators planning their next production.

steps.title: Input your script or story
steps.description: Provide your text content—whether detailed or brief. GPT-5.2 analyzes the narrative and identifies the most impactful visual moments for your storyboard.

steps.title: AI generates shot prompts
steps.description: The workflow creates professional shot descriptions with varied camera angles (wide, medium, close-up), ensuring cinematic rhythm and visual storytelling.

steps.title: Split into individual frames
steps.description: Each shot is formatted as a separate storyboard frame with detailed visual prompts optimized for image generation.

steps.title: Generate storyboard images
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro creates each frame, maintaining visual consistency across all shots for a cohesive storyboard presentation.

whoIsFor.title: Built for visual storytellers
whoIsFor.subtitle: From indie filmmakers to production studios, see who creates storyboards with AI.

audiences.label: Advertising agencies

items.question: What is the Storyboard Generation workflow?
items.answer: This AI workflow transforms text content (scripts, stories, concepts) into professional video storyboards. It generates a sequence of cinematic shots with varied camera angles, creating visual references for film and video production.

items.question: How does it handle different content lengths?
items.answer: The AI adapts to your content: for detailed scripts, it extracts key visual moments; for brief concepts, it expands with creative visual details. Both approaches result in compelling storyboard sequences.

items.question: What camera angles does it generate?
items.answer: The workflow creates varied shot types following cinematic conventions: establishing shots, wide shots, medium shots, close-ups, extreme close-ups, low angles, high angles, and more—ensuring dynamic visual rhythm.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses GPT-5.2 for script analysis and shot prompt generation, GPT-4o for splitting content into individual frames, and Nano Banana Pro for generating the storyboard images.

items.question: How many frames can I generate?
items.answer: You can specify the number of storyboard frames you need. The AI will select the most impactful visual moments from your content to fill the requested frame count.

items.question: Are the frames visually consistent?
items.answer: Yes, Nano Banana Pro maintains visual consistency across all generated frames—including character appearance, lighting style, and color grading—for a cohesive storyboard.

items.question: Can I use this for commercial projects?
items.answer: Absolutely. The generated storyboards can be used for commercial film productions, advertising campaigns, music videos, and client presentations.

items.question: What input format works best?
items.answer: Any text format works: screenplay format, prose descriptions, bullet points, or even brief concept notes. The AI adapts its output based on the detail level of your input.
